message:
test(fcp-core): pin ZoneId 5-zone classifier matrix + ZoneIdError 8-variant Display (flywheel_connectors-y4lj9)

Bead asks for ZoneClass Display + serde tag pinning. No type literally
named ZoneClass exists in fcp-core; the closest closed-taxonomy analogue
is ZoneId at capability.rs:386 with its 5 documented zone constants
(OWNER/PRIVATE/WORK/COMMUNITY/PUBLIC). These ARE the documented zone
classes. ZoneIdError at capability.rs:419 is the 8-variant rejection
enum that pins the boundary of the taxonomy.

Existing zone_id_display.rs covers Display roundtrip;
zone_id_equality_across_paths.rs covers equality;
zone_id_parse_error_matrix.rs covers variant selection during parsing.
NOT covered: per-zone-constant exact-string pinning, ZoneId serde
scalar-string + CBOR Text shapes, distinct-zone sentinels across all
serde forms, ZoneIdError per-variant Display verbatim + distinct-Display
sentinel.

Coverage: 5 zone constants pinned to exact "z:<class>" strings, 5
constructor methods produce expected text + as_bytes consistency,
pairwise distinctness across all 5 zones (eq + hash + JSON), JSON
scalar-string serialization, JSON deserialize rejects non-canonical
strings (empty / missing prefix / uppercase / empty segment), CBOR
Text scalar shape, Display+FromStr fixed-point. ZoneIdError 8-variant
Display verbatim with payload preservation (index/len/max/prefix/ch),
distinct-Display sentinel across all 8 variants, std::error::Error impl.

20 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-y4lj9 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_class_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
